options.name: -all
options.description: Performs DRV, Setup, Hold and Power optimization in PBA mode

options.name: -area
options.description: Reclaims area on the netlist with a target of not causing any DRV/Setup/Hold degradation.

options.name: -drv
options.description: Optimizes DRV violations. DRV optimization fixes violations in the order (glitch, drv, xtalk delta delay).

options.name: -dynamic
options.description: Reclaims dynamic power on the netlist with a target of not causing any DRV/Setup/Hold degradation.

options.name: -hold
options.description: Optimizes hold timing violations on the netlist with a target of not causing any DRV/Setup degradation.

options.name: -leakage
options.description: Reclaims leakage power on the netlist with a target of not causing any DRV/Setup/Hold degradation.

options.name: -outDir
options.description: Timing reports would be saved in this directory

options.name: -power
options.description: Reclaims total power on the netlist with a target of not causing any DRV/Setup/Hold degradation.

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Prefix for timing report file names

options.name: -reportFullClockPath
options.description: Enable full clock path in detailed report

options.name: -setup
options.description: Optimizes setup timing violations on the netlist with a target of not causing any DRV/Hold degradation.
